subject: Yajirobe in close-up portrait, heavyset build, long dark hair, dark gi
description: A heavyset humanoid man is shown in a close-up to mid-shot, body slightly angled, with a somewhat defensive or tense posture. He has long dark hair worn loose. He wears a dark gi or fighting uniform. His expression reads as nervous, wary, or reluctant — not the confident stance of a frontline fighter. No sword is clearly visible in hand or at his side at this framing, though a samurai-type silhouette is consistent with the figure's overall build. The background is a light urban or outdoor neutral setting.
foreground: Heavyset man with long dark hair in dark gi, tense or wary posture
